title: qPCR assay for detecting round goby invasive fish species Neogobius melanostomus
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"beuk9","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9f9ia","text":"Members of Ponto-Caspian gobies are predatory fish which have colonized freshwaters and brackish waters in Europe and North America causing a lot changes in the native ecosystems.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5kvma","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4cg78","text":"Several eDNA assays were developed to identify round goby fish. We are going to describe two successful assays.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"4icls","text":"Handling high concentration of positive controls was performed in a post-PCR room which is physically separated from the pre-PCR room to avoid contamination. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"37amg","text":"Always add your samples first and seal them before adding the serial dilutions of positive control (standard) at the end.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"dpeov","text":"Laboratory work space and equipment were sterilized by UV-light and DNase solution and 70% ethanol. Filter pipet tips were used in all steps of the laboratory work.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"56p9p","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c22jg","text":" Negative controls of DNase/RNase free water in each qPCR assay.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"8ih2o","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c4k5o","text":"UltraPure\u0026trade; DEPC-treated WaterThermo FisherCatalog #10813012","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7tu3j","text":"TaqMan™ Environmental Master Mix 2.0 https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/4396838#/4396838","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":37,"length":67}],"data":{}},{"key":"b7sdk","text":"Interbal control http://www.primerdesign.co.uk/assets/files/internal_control_handbook_dna.pdf?timestamp=1504081027","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":17,"length":97}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"BC2B5CC349E011EBA9620A58A9FEAC2A","url":"https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/4396838#/4396838"}},"1":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"57244870445611EB90930A58A9FEAC2A","url":"http://www.primerdesign.co.uk/assets/files/internal_control_handbook_dna.pdf?timestamp=1504081027"}}}}
steps: A tissue of round goby was extracted with Qiagen DNeasy blood and tissue extraction kit https://www.qiagen.com/us/shop/pcr/dneasy-blood-and-tissue-kit/ The quality of DNA and 260/280 ratio were checked by NanoDrop instrument for nucleic acid measurements.

Primers A B C D E F 1 Neogobius melanostomus Primer Reference Temperature Length GC content 2 3 Neo_Mel_COI_F01 5’-CTTCTRGCCTCCTCTGGWGTTG-3’ Andersen et al., 2016 59.6 -62.8 22 54-59 4 Neo_Mel_COI_R01 5’-CCCWAGAATTGASGARATKCCGG-3’ 58.9 -63.9 23 47-56 5 Neo_Mel_COI_P01 5’-FAM-CAGGCAACTTRGCACATGCAG-BHQ-3’ 60.1 - 62.9 21 52-57 6 NeoMeI_IK_F1 5’- TATGTGATGATCGGACAGC-3’ Adrian-Kalchhauser & Burkhardt-Holm, 2016. 19 53-56 7 NeoMel_IK_R1 5’- GTTCTCTAGTCAGCTCGCT-3’ 19 45-51 8 NeoMeI_IK_Probe 5’-FAM-CATCTTTCTCGGCTTATTCCCCA-BHQ-3’ 23
2 µL Standard DNA dilution To determine both limit of quantification and limit of detection, genomic DNA of round goby was serially diluted from 1e 2 -1e -4 .

The composition of PCR mixture A B C D 1 PCR reagent Stock solution Working solution Final concetration (μL) 2 TaqMan Environmental Mastermix 2 2X 1X 10 3 Forward primer 10 μM 0.4 μM 1 4 Reverse primer 10 μM 0.4 μM 1 5 TaqMan probe 2.5 μM 0.1 μM 1 6 Internal control (IC) primer/probe mix 1 7 IC-DNA 0.5 8 DNase/RNase free water 8.5 9 Template 2 10 Total volume 25 RNase/DNase free water was used as a negative control. Lower volume of PCR mixture was tested and efficiency was evaluated.

- °C Amplification conditions A B C D 1 Step Time Temp 2 50 cycles Enzyme activation 10 min 95 3 Denaturation 15 s 95 4 Data collection 1 min 60 Enzyme activation temperature depends on the type of qPCR master mixture.

QPCR was performed in BioRad qPCR machine CFX96. Analysis of qPCR results was performed through CFX maestro software https://www.bio-rad.com/en-se/product/cfx-maestro-software-for-cfx-real-time-pcr-instruments?ID=OKZP7E15

The analysis of PCR internal control The Cq value obtained with the internal control will vary significantly depending on the extraction efficiency, the quantity of DNA added to the PCR reaction and the individual machine settings. Cq values of 26 or 27±3 are within the normal range.

To check for inhibitors in DNA samples, internal control was used, http://www.primerdesign.co.uk/assets/files/internal_control_handbook_dna.pdf?timestamp=1469446474 OR: https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/4308321.
creator: Omneya Osman
